title: Elfen Lied
sourceNotes: TV anime (13 eps, 2004, Arms) adapts Lynn Okamoto's manga but compresses and heavily reorders the multi-chapter flashbacks, and by the finale diverges into an anime-original ending. It loosely covers roughly the first six volumes (through ch. ~61; readers are advised to continue the manga around ch. 62). The manga is complete: AniList lists 113 chapters (commonly cited as 107 numbered chapters plus extras) across 12 volumes. Per-arc chapter ranges are approximate due to the anime's reordering.

mappings.arc: Lucy's Escape & Maple House (Kouta, Yuka, Nyu)
Unadapted (Diclonius War & the manga's true conclusion)
